detailed_description: This video captures a crucial aspect of patient care within a hospital setting, illustrating the meticulous process of safely transferring a patient after a medical procedure. It showcases the coordinated efforts of several medical staff members who carefully reposition the patient from a prone to a supine position on the operating table using specialized supports. Following the successful turn, the patient is gently covered and secured, demonstrating the team's commitment to patient comfort and safety during transition. The final segment highlights the careful transport of the patient out of the procedure room, emphasizing professional handling throughout the entire process.

segments.why_kept: This segment is kept as the Semantic Core because it vividly demonstrates the primary 'process' and 'labor' of the medical staff in safely turning, securing, and transporting a patient post-procedure. It highlights the coordinated teamwork and professional technique involved in this critical patient handling, showcasing the core expertise and action of the video.
